title: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (PLLIF) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
article_text: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (PLLIF) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Italy's Pirelli investor Camfin says it will not renew shareholder pact with Sinochem
article_text: Italy's Pirelli investor Camfin said on Friday it would not renew its shareholder pact with China's Sinochem.

title: Italy, Pirelli explore new ways to end Chinese involvement in tyremaker, FT reports
article_text: Tyremaker Pirelli and Italy's government are exploring new ways to end Chinese state-owned Sinochem's involvement in the Milan‑based company amid U.S. pressure, the Financial Times reported on Tuesday.

title: EV Ferrari won't sell in Europe but will in Asia, Pirelli's Tronchetti says
article_text: Pirelli Executive Vice Chairman Marco Tronchetti Provera said on Wednesday he expected Ferrari's upcoming first fully electric model to do well in Asia but not so much in Europe.

title: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (PLLIF) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
article_text: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (OTCPK:PLLIF) Q3 2025 Earnings Call November 6, 2025 12:30 PM EST Company Participants Marco Provera Andrea Livio Casaluci - CEO & Executive Director Fabio Bocchio - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Monica Bosio - Intesa Sanpaolo Equity Research Harry Martin - Sanford C.

title: Italy on right track to solve Pirelli's governance issues, minister says
article_text: Italy's government is "on the right track" to find a solution to tyremaker Pirelli's governance issues, Italian Industry Minister Adolfo Urso said on Friday, as he visited a company facility in Milan.

title: Italy's Pirelli to supply carmaker Aston Martin with Cyber Tyre technology
article_text: British sportscar maker Aston Martin will adopt Cyber Tyre technology from Italy's Pirelli for future vehicles, the two companies said in a joint statement on Thursday.

title: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (PLLIF) Q2 2025 Earnings Conference Call Transcript
article_text: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (OTCPK:PLLIF) Q2 2025 Earnings Call July 31, 2025 12:30 PM ET Company Participants Andrea Livio Donato Casaluci - CEO & Executive Director Fabio Bocchio - Chief Financial Officer Marco Tronchetti Provera - Executive Vice Chairman Conference Call Participants Akshat Kacker - JPMorgan Chase & Co, Research Division Christoph Laskawi - Deutsche Bank AG, Research Division Gianluca Bertuzzo - Intermonte SIM S.p.A.

title: Pirelli boss says issues with China's Sinochem will be fixed
article_text: Pirelli chief Marco Tronchetti Provera said on Friday the tensions at the tyremaker involving China's state-controlled Sinochem , its main shareholder, are on the way to being resolved.

title: U.S. warns Pirelli on possible sale restrictions over Chinese investors, Bloomberg says
article_text: The United States has warned Pirelli that sales of vehicles fitted with its data-collecting technology could be restricted due to concerns over the influence on the tyremaker of its Chinese investor, Bloomberg reported on Tuesday.

title: Pirelli's Chinese investor rejected 'unfair' proposal but open to collaborate
article_text: A leading Chinese investor in Italian tyre maker Pirelli said on Thursday a proposal the company had put forward to solve problems that having a Chinese shareholder pose for its U.S. expansion plans were "seriously unfair".

title: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (PLLIF) Q1 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
article_text: Pirelli & C. S.p.A. (OTCPK:PLLIF) Q1 2025 Earnings Conference Call May 14, 2025 12:30 PM ET Company Participants Marco Tronchetti Provera - Executive Vice-Chairman Andrea Livio Casaluci - Chief Executive Officer Fabio Bocchio - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Akshat Kacker - JPMorgan Martin Harry - Bernstein Martino De Ambroggi - Equita Gianluca Bertuzzo - Intermonte Stephen Benhamou - BNP Paribas Ross MacDonald - Citi Thomas Besson - Kepler Cheuvreux Monica Bosio - Intesa Sanpaolo Edoardo Spina - HSBC Operator Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Pirelli's Conference Call in which Pirelli top management will present the company's First Quarter 2025 Results.

title: Pirelli Warns Auto Tariffs Could Pressure Earnings, Cash Generation Targets
article_text: Pirelli said earnings and cash generation could come in at the lower end of guidance this year if President Trump's tariffs on the automotive industry remain in force.

title: Pirelli says it has no plans to invest in the United States
article_text: Pirelli is not planning investments in the United States at the moment, the tyre maker said on Friday, contradicting a report in an Italian newspaper.

title: Pirelli board postpones financial report approval to April 28
article_text: Pirelli has postponed to April 28 the conclusions of its board meeting which had been scheduled to end on Thursday, the Italian tyremaker said, amid protracted tensions between leading investors.

title: TireHub Broadens Premium Portfolio by Adding Pirelli
article_text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--TireHub, the national tire distributor co-founded by The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company (Goodyear) and Bridgestone Americas Inc. (Bridgestone), will begin distributing Pirelli tires in early 2025. The addition of Pirelli, a global tire brand known for its cutting-edge technology, high-end production excellence and passion for innovation, further reinforces TireHub's position as the leading distributor of premium products with a broad range of top-performing tires a.

title: Pirelli investor Camfin plans to raise stake to 29.9%, Italian daily says
article_text: Camfin, the family vehicle of Pirelli's executive vice chairman Marco Tronchetti Provera, is planning to increase its stake in the tyremaker to 29.9% from 26.1%, Italian daily Il Messaggero reported on Thursday.

title: Pirelli: Using 11% Free Cash Flow Yield To Reduce The Net Debt
article_text: Pirelli's share price is down 10% despite reaffirming its 2024-2025 outlook, with a current market cap of approximately 5.2B EUR. Financial results show a slight revenue increase and a 4.4% EBITDA growth, but net profit is impacted by higher financial expenses. Pirelli has tightened its 2024 guidance and expects improved EBIT margins and reduced net debt, with a new 50% dividend payout policy.

title: Pirelli CEO says company is not currently planning any factory closures
article_text: Italian tyremaker Pirelli is not planning to close any of its factories as a response to the crisis of the automotive industry, CEO Andrea Casaluci said at a business conference in Milan.

title: Tire Producers: Healthy Dividends With Defensive History
article_text: The tire manufacturing industry deserves the attention of defense minded investors looking for safe yield. Tire manufacturers' revenue and margins have been broadly stable through recent economic upsets; a tire's limited service life is independent of economic cycles. Five tire manufacturers offering yields of up to 4.1% were evaluated using a relative quality matrix with factors including valuation, growth, profitability, net debt, yield, and payout ratio.

title: Pirelli and Bosch to cooperate on 'intelligent tyre' technology
article_text: Italian tyremaker Pirelli and German tech group Robert Bosch GMBH will jointly develop a software-based "intelligent tyre" technology, the two companies said Tuesday.

title: More safety, comfort, and driving dynamics: Bosch and Pirelli signed a development cooperation for intelligent tyre technology
article_text: The cooperation will combine Bosch's expertise in system-level hardware, software, with MEMS sensors and Pirelli's Cyber Tyre technologies, algorithms, modeling and in-tyre sensors The cooperation will combine Bosch's expertise in system-level hardware, software, with MEMS sensors and Pirelli's Cyber Tyre technologies, algorithms, modeling and in-tyre sensors

title: Pirelli Elect: More Than 500 Homologations for Technology Dedicated to Electric and Plug-In Hybrid Cars
article_text: MILAN, Italy, Aug. 23, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Pirelli has obtained over 500 homologations for its Elect tyres since their launch in 2019. These tyres include a package of technologies that enhance the specific characteristics of electric and plug-in hybrid cars. This milestone confirms the company's leadership in the EV segment, with seven out of 10 premium and prestige car manufacturers choosing Pirelli tyres developed for BEVs and PHEVs1.

title: Pirelli: Tire Giant Trading At A 10% Free Cash Flow Yield
article_text: Pirelli's revenue remained flat in 2023, but lower operating costs led to increased profits and free cash flows. The company's guidance for 2025 includes a revenue increase and margin expansion, making the current share price attractive with a 10% free cash flow yield. Pirelli's stock is priced attractively at 4.5 times the adjusted EBITDA in 2025, indicating a good investment opportunity.

title: Buy 11 MediaMade April ProActive Dividend Dogs
article_text: On April 1, 2024, Barron's, Bloomberg, and Kiplinger analysts listed four sets of stocks here-named ProActive for 2024. Those four articles revealed 28 equities, with 24 paying-dividends. The four ProActive lists focused on 5 ‘infrastructure' companies from Barron's along-with 8 selected "best" and 5 "best cheap" stocks from Kiplinger and "10 to watch" from Bloomberg. For April, those 28 top ProActive stocks ranged 0.23% to 13.28% in annual-yield and ranged -39.1% to 53.70% in one-year price-target-upsides per broker-analysts.

title: Euro Stoxx 600 sits at ATH ahead of Bayer, Pirelli, Vivendi earnings
article_text: The Stoxx 600 index will be in the spotlight this week as the European Central Bank (ECB) delivers its second interest rate decision of the year. The index, which tracks the biggest European companies, surged to a record high of €497, which was about 30% above its lowest point in December 2022.

title: Pirelli Enlists Prince Gyasi For A Radically Reincarnated 50th Calendar
article_text: Infamous for its ‘soft-porn for the C-suite' ethos, Pirelli's 50th calendar, shot by Ghanaian Prince Gyasi is a radical reinvention, rippling with with lessons for brands

title: Pirelli gets new board after battle over Chinese influence
article_text: Pirelli investors on Monday approved a new board for the tyremaker, giving it a new three-year governance set-up after the Italian government last month took steps to curb the influence of the company's leading Chinese investor.

title: Pirelli's top Chinese investor proposes Sinochem CEO to chair new board
article_text: Pirelli said on Friday its Chinese investor Sinochem had put forward a new top executive as chairman at the Italian tyre maker -- a move that could help to ease tensions between its main shareholders.

title: Europe---and Tiremaker Pirelli---Struggle to 'De-risk' From China
article_text: Even Italy, previously one of the most pro-China Western economies, is taking a more skeptical approach. But that comes with its own risks.

title: Pirelli CEO-designate Giorgio Bruno to leave the company
article_text: Giorgio Bruno, who was the designated new CEO of Italian tyremaker Pirelli , is leaving the company, shareholder Camfin said on Tuesday, confirming earlier press reports.

title: Italy ties China's hands at Pirelli over fears about chip technology
article_text: Italy has imposed several curbs on Pirelli's biggest shareholder, Sinochem, in a move aimed at blocking the Chinese government's access to sensitive chip technology.

title: Pirelli CEO 'confident' Rome will act to curb Chinese influence over tyremaker -source
article_text: Pirelli's CEO said in a recent private meeting that he is "very confident" Rome will use its Golden Power to curb Chinese influence over the Italian tyremaker, deemed a strategic asset, a person with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Italy probing China's possible growing influence on Pirelli -sources
article_text: The Italian government, which is assessing tyre maker Pirelli's new shareholder agreement, is concerned about plans to allow top shareholder China's Sinochem to appoint more board members and potentially choose future CEOs, two sources said.

title: Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli Selects CommScope's RUCKUS Networks as Wi-Fi Official Supplier
article_text: HICKORY, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Elite sailing team Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli has selected RUCKUS Networks as its Wi-Fi official supplier as it seeks to qualify for the America's Cup.

title: IBM, Pirelli, Danone among first to sign pact limiting record lobbying spending
article_text: A handful of big corporate names, including IBM and the North American arm of Italian tire maker Pirelli, have said they'll limit or forgo lobbying and political candidate contributions in an effort to rein in what some observers believe is an aggressive degree of corporate influence on lawmakers.

title: Pirelli raises sales target as pricing power offsets inflation
article_text: Strong pricing power and cost savings will help Pirelli offset economic challenges, the Italian tyremaker said on Thursday as it beat second-quarter operating profit expectations and raised its full-year revenue forecast.

title: EV Drivers Love That Quick Acceleration - And That's Forcing Companies Like Pirelli To Rethink Tire Design
article_text: The increasing adoption of electric vehicle - both car and trucks - has many drivers paying close attention to things like air pressure and wear rates. Indeed, Pirelli says they think EV drivers wear out tires 20% faster on average.

title: Pirelli operating profit tops estimates in Q1, trims year margin forecast
article_text: MILAN (Reuters) -Italy's Pirelli said on Tuesday its operating profit grew 35% in the first quarter, topping estimates, despite an economic outlook for this year that is being darkened by geopolitical tensions, inflation and a lockdown in China.

title: Pirelli puts brake on Russian activities
article_text: Italy's Pirelli said on Thursday it had halted investments in Russia, excluding those linked to security, and that the activity of its factories in the country would be curtailed.
